content.text: Yeah, so — I'm not really sure this is the right venue for it, but people keep suggesting I talk to someone. The thing is, I keep putting off this product launch. Big one. And I genuinely can't figure out why, because fear isn't really my deal — I mean, I free solo, I've taken companies through some pretty high-stakes moments — so it's not that. It's more like a... logistical thing, maybe. Or discipline. I don't know.
